instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: An OS command injection vulnerability in FortiDeceptor 3.1.0, 3.0.1, 3.0.0 may allow a remote authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the system by exploiting a command injection vulnerability on the Customization page.
output: FortiDeceptor versions 3.1.0, 3.0.1, and 3.0.0 contain an operating system command injection vulnerability. This flaw allows a remote, authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the affected system via the Customization page.
